data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for seat metadata.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for seat metadata, specifically section, row, number, and accessibility. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or correctness of this metadata. The prior step evidence does not address the requirement directly, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or correctness of seat metadata (section/row/number/accessibility).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the seat metadata requirement.
